description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male religious figure, dressed in ornate liturgical vestments with intricate gold patterns and a long robe. The figure holds an open book in his left hand and gestures with his right, suggesting a moment of teaching or blessing. A delicate, circular halo with a filigree design is attached behind the head, emphasizing the figure's sanctity. The sculpture stands on a multi-faceted, gold-colored pedestal with decorative trim. The back of the robe features elaborate embroidery and the word 'ALIAS' inscribed near the top. The overall color palette includes gold, cream, and subtle red accents, giving the piece a solemn and reverent appearance.
description: A detailed sculpture of a male religious figure in ornate robes, holding a book and adorned with a filigree halo, standing on a gold pedestal.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the figure's face, open book, and detailed vestments with the halo clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the thickness of the book, and the draping of the robe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full embroidery on the back of the robe and the inscription 'ALIAS' beneath the halo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the gesture of the right hand, and the side details of the vestments.
attribute_subject_matter: male religious figure holding a book with a halo
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the background is isolated and does not provide environmental context.
